name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M11777 Gold Buckle] This Louis Vuitton classic Sarah wallet is made from two-tone Monogram Empreinte leather, exuding an elegant style. Adorned with the signature Monogram embossed pattern, the envelope-style flap features a gold button. Opening the wallet reveals an organized interior with two large compartments, multiple pockets, and 16 card slots. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm (L x H x W) C
